name: restaurant general managers managing 5-15 staff members tool
description: For restaurant general managers managing 5-15 staff members, inefficient labor scheduling causes overstaffing or understaffing. We automate labor forecasting and scheduling instead of manual scheduling and labor forecasting.
target_audience: restaurant general managers managing 5-15 staff members
problem_solved: inefficient labor scheduling leading to overstaffing or understaffing
